name: California Check Cashing Stores
description_short: Placerville's California Check Cashing Stores location at 384 Placerville Dr offers fast check cashing, money orders, and bill payment services with convenient weekday and Saturday hours.
description_long:
Located at 384 Placerville Dr, Suite E in Placerville, CA, California Check Cashing Stores provides essential financial services to the local community. The standalone storefront operates Monday through Friday from 9 AM to 7 PM, with Saturday hours from 10 AM to 4 PM, making it accessible for working professionals and weekend shoppers.

This Placerville location specializes in check cashing, money orders, bill payments, and short-term lending solutions. Call +1 530-626-4888 during business hours for questions about fees, processing times, or to confirm service availability. The staff can advise you on required documentation and same-day processing options.

When you need quick check cashing in Placerville, this location delivers same-day service with straightforward, no-nonsense processing. Bring a valid ID and your check to get cash in minutes. California Check Cashing Stores serves Placerville residents who need reliable alternatives to traditional banking.
address: 384 Placerville Dr ste e, Placerville, CA 95667

company_info.headquarters: 384 Placerville Dr ste e, Placerville, CA 95667

pros: Multiple San Francisco locations within close proximity for accessibility
Extended weekday hours (9 AM–7 PM Monday–Friday)
Western Union money transfers and money orders available in-store
Online loan application option to start the process before visiting
Tax preparation services available alongside financial services
Green Dot Visa® Debit Cards and reloadable debit cards for unbanked consumers
Bill pay services bundled with check cashing in one stop
cons: Payday loans capped at $250 — too small for meaningful emergency expenses
Rates and fees are not disclosed online; consumers must visit a store for details
Closed Sundays; Saturday hours limited to 10 AM–4 PM
Company's own notice warns that small-dollar loans used long-term can be expensive
Services limited to California locations only
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing immediate check cashing without a bank account
People who need to send money internationally via Western Union
Consumers needing a small cash advance of up to $250 before their next paycheck
Low-income filers seeking in-person tax preparation assistance
diagnosis: California Check Cashing Stores is best for unbanked or underbanked consumers in California who need immediate check cashing, small cash advances up to $250, or bundled in-person financial services like bill pay and Western Union transfers. The main caveat is that fees are not disclosed online and payday loans are capped at $250 — consumers with bank access will find cheaper alternatives elsewhere.
services: In-store customer service and loan processing
meta_description: California Check Cashing Stores at 384 Placerville Dr, Placerville, CA. Fast check cashing and money orders with convenient hours.
